subcodes.first_line: O friends! Today the Speaker of Sinai is manifest and evident, and upon the branches of the heavenly Lote-Tree doth speak and proclaim [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان امروز مکلم طور ظاهر و هویدا و بر اغصان سدره فردوس ناطق و گویا
subcodes.subjects: @Word of God and human limitations, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @exhortations and counsels
